name: Harvest Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sliced green onions, including tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the sliced carrots in oil over medium heat for about 5 minutes.
2. Add the sliced green onions and chopped apples to the skillet. Continue cooking for an additional 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the cooked brown rice, salt, seedless raisins, and sesame seeds. Cook until all ingredients are thoroughly heated.
Each serving provides:
193 calories
3.1 g. protein
3.6 g. fat
38.8 g. carbohydrate
189 mg. sodium
0 mg. cholesterol
Source: Brown Rice
